heading: Short title
label: 31101 Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Public Vessels Act”.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3110146 App.:781 note.

Short Title, , which enacted chapter 22 (§ 781 et seq.) of the former Appendix to this title, was popularly known as the “Public Vessels Act”, prior to being repealed and restated in this chapter by , §§ 6(c), 19, , , 1710.Act of March 3, 1925, ch. 42843 Stat. 1112Pub. L. 109–304120 Stat. 1509Oct. 6, 2006
